description_long: This is a pixelated, rectangular juice can with a predominantly blue exterior, featuring a stylized lemon slice and green leaves graphic on the front. The can is decorated with white dots, possibly representing bubbles, suggesting a carbonated or refreshing beverage. The top of the can is light gray with a visible pull tab, indicating it is meant to be opened by pulling the tab upwards. The sides of the can are plain blue, with no additional graphics or text. The overall design is simple and blocky, reminiscent of retro video game aesthetics. No brand name or nutritional information is visible on the can.
description: A blue, pixelated juice can with a lemon slice graphic and a pull tab on top, styled in a retro, blocky design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the lemon slice graphic, green leaves, white bubbles, and the pull tab on top.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain blue surface with no graphics or text.
description_view_2: Back view, nearly identical to the front, with the lemon slice graphic and pull tab visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing a plain blue surface with no additional features.
